dialogue.name: Female member
dialogue.speech: It's the day Eden College announces the admissions results.

dialogue.name: Female Member
dialogue.speech: The results should be posted at hours today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is more nerve-racking than I thought it'd be.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: My bracelet just broke. Why did it have to happen today?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, I'm sure it's just a coincidence.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, come on, Yor. Black cats being unlucky is just a superstition.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Ah, the thing we've got Agent Twilight doing.

dialogue.name: Female Member
dialogue.speech: Chief, peace between the East and West hangs on Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: You don't know Twilight very well, do you?

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He might just be the best spy in all of Westalis, so don't worry so much.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He'll be telling us that "the sakura blossoms bloom" soon enough.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: It's a code phrase from the Far East.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry... It's all because I stepped in poop.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That is the waiting list of successful applicants, though rather confidential.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Correct. Once her overall scores were tallied,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Anya Forger placed first on that waiting list.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: If any of the current successful applicants were to withdraw,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: she'll immediately get into the school.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Do you know what the number one k*ller of our species on this planet is?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Yes. You saved Master Swan from that brutal k*ller back there.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That brought your score up tremendously.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Your family is worthy of our school.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So if even one person withdraws, Miss Anya will get in?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If it's not too much trouble, I will be taking your life.

dialogue.name: Zachry Feiss
dialogue.speech: I have a son who's just about to turn six!

dialogue.name: Zachry Feiss
dialogue.speech: He'll be starting at Eden College next month!

dialogue.name: Zachry Feiss
dialogue.speech: If I die, he won't be able to go to school!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm terribly sorry, but that's exactly why I'm doing this.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: For the sake of Miss Anya getting into the school...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You mustn't take the life of an innocent person, Yor!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm terribly sorry, Mr. Zachry Feiss.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: There are a few that withdraw every year.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Make sure you are properly prepared for the eventuality.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much, Master Henderson.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I must warn you that I may not be teaching here by the time you arrive.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I was forced to give that swine a good thrashing.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I was able to protect Eden's honor, but who know what ramifications await me?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That foolish man and this instructor...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm not sure which one will be more useful to me in my mission,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but if that fool stands in my way, I have plenty of ways to destroy him.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Please let me know if there's anything I can do to help.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I appreciate the attempt at consolation, my elegant boy.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Just await that call at home.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya will be accepted... Anya will be accepted...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya will be accepted... Anya will be accepted...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What in the world is she doing?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Apparently, she's performing a prayer dance to help her get accepted.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You did a great job, Anya!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, thank goodness! What wonderful news!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you for all you did as well, Yor.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Heya. I heard she got in.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Oh, you must be the missus. Pleasure to meet you!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Let's get this party started! I got some booze, and I ordered delivery!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Who do you think you are?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: This is all thanks to me stealing the answer sheet.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Are you even drinking, you party pooper?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Daddy said he'll buy you anything as a reward just for today!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey! Don't go promising her things like that!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't want you to buy me anything, but I wanna do something!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I don't mind as long as it's doable.

dialogue.name: Commander (TV)
dialogue.speech: Your mission today is to save the kidnapped Princess Honey,

dialogue.name: Commander (TV)
dialogue.speech: and take her back the castle.

dialogue.name: TV Narrator
dialogue.speech: The kingdom's best spy infiltrates the castle...

dialogue.name: TV Narrator
dialogue.speech: Taking down any enemy that stands in his way,

dialogue.name: TV Narrator
dialogue.speech: he finally makes it to the princess.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I'm here to save you, Princess Honey!

dialogue.name: TV Narrator
dialogue.speech: Peace was restored to the castle, and their love continued to grow.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is what I wanna do.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What you wanna do? Wait, you mean...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna play "save Anya from the castle"!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I'm not going to school if you don't do this!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No one asked you to speak for her.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Oh, hey. I'm pretty sure that's Newston Castle.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I heard it was recently remodeled into some cartoon's theme park,

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: It's got the same kinds of tricks and traps seen in the show,

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: and you can even rent it out.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: The government doesn't have any eyes over there, Loidy Boy,

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: so it wouldn't hurt to have a little bit of fun.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: After everything she went through to pass, too.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Doesn't seem fair if you can't get some kind of reward, huh, kiddo?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Right, then! Let's strike while the iron's hot!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Leave the castle reservation to me. You're in charge of our ride!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wha?! You expect us to go today?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And you want me to arrange this?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Well, of course! It's for your daughter!

dialogue.name: Comms Engineer
dialogue.speech: We have a message from Twilight.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He might just be the best spy in all of Westalis...

dialogue.name: Female Member
dialogue.speech: Get him what he needs at once!

dialogue.name: Comms Engineer
dialogue.speech: To Falcon in the Rhynnick region.

dialogue.name: Falcon
dialogue.speech: Falcon here. Roger the emergency operation from Twilight, over.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: " hours... Meet downstream on the Nein River in the Rhynnick region."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They sure didn't waste any time.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Believe it or not, this castle can do this, too!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya's never been on a plane before! It's so exciting!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid! Where did you get this li'l plane?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, some wonderful coworkers of mine are letting me borrow it.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Fank you for always looking after my husband.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You all have your seatbelts on? Here we go.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It looks like a tweasure chest.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're about to land. Make sure you're properly seated.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You don't need to go running around with her!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What do you mean by that?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Can you truly call a castle with no enemies or servants

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't think I can go to school now.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I know, right? I can't blame ya, little missy.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Daddy better step up his game.

dialogue.name: Comms Engineer
dialogue.speech: We have a report from Twilight.

dialogue.name: Female Member
dialogue.speech: This will be a true test for WISE.

dialogue.name: Comms Engineer
dialogue.speech: Report to Newston Castle for an emergency operation.

dialogue.name: Comms Engineer
dialogue.speech: This is an extremely important assignment regarding Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Comms Engineer
dialogue.speech: I repeat: this is an extremely important assignment regarding Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: I gotta get his autograph later.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Look at your agency coming through for you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much for gathering here today on behalf of my daughter.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I would like for all of you to play the part of the enemies

xml.narration: This assignment is an imperative part of Operation Strix, and you do not to need to inquire further about it

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: of a spy who is coming to save a princess.

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: I have absolutely no idea what's going on...

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: But this is Twilight we're talking about. I'm sure this is all according to plan.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: This man will explain the details. Follow his orders from now on

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you again for doing this for my daughter.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: All right! Let's announce the cast!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is the spy person who's gonna save me!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: to the very capable subordinates of Count Scruffy Head!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I need you all to put on your best performances

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: and get in Loidman's way as much as possible!

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: This mission ranking is over SS.

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: I'll make any sacrifice necessary to see this mission through!

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: I couldn't ask for a better opponent than Twilight!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You can all decide for yourselves how you're going to get in Loidman's way.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I am not exaggerating when I say the success of this plan is in your hands!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Make Loidman suffer as much as possible for Princess Anya's sake!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Once you're all prepared, get to your positions!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Scruffy, scruffy, scruffy, scruff! Princess Anya is mine!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If you want her back, come after me!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Loidman! You are about to face many obstacles in order to get the princess back!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: we have a quiz that the princess made up in this courtyard, so listen up!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If you can't answer correctly, you'll be putting that on!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You betcha! A Bondman costume set!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: What does Princess Anya like about Bondman?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Bzzz! The fact that he has a p*stol with a sil*ncer!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Oh, come on! You're her dad and you don't even know that?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Tch. Guess that was too easy.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If you get it wrong, you'll be changing into that outfit, Loidman!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's if I don't get it.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: What does Anya want right now?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What does she want right now?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You didn't say anything about a time limit!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I never said there wouldn't be one, either.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Calm down. What does Anya want right now?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: What's the correct answer, Princess Anya?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm thirsty, so I'd like some water, please!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How the hell would I know that?!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Now, let's have you keep your word!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: All right, then! On to the next stage!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If you want to save Princess Anya, you'll have to make your way up here!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You've got this, my minions! Don't let him win!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Loid! Let them hit you, damn it!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Now you've done it, you b*stard!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Don't think you're gonna catch us that easily!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Scruffy, scruffy, scruffy, scruff! I'm impressed you got this far, Loidman!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: But I won't let you have the princess!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you seriously telling me I have to act out this embarrassing

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: little play in front of all of these agents?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But in the end... this is for the mission!

dialogue.name: Agent
dialogue.speech: I can't believe we get to see Twilight's acting skills in person!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You fool! You think I'd hand her over that easily?!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Now, go! The most powerful witch in the world, Yorticia!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What the hell is going on in this story?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Anyone who tries to kidnap Miss Anya...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why is she using physical attacks when she's a witch?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Excellent work getting this far, Loidman!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: But you won't defeat me that easil—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I... I've come to save you, Princess Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wait... I'm supposed to be your dad in this?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I've had so much excitement ever since I left the orphanage!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: It's all thanks to you, Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hm? Oh... I'm happy for you.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna do my best in school!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, anyway... congratulations on getting into the school.

dialogue.name: Female member
dialogue.speech: Sir, the expense report from Agent Twilight.
